
### vulnerable code 

 <!-- \lstset{
    style=small,
    language=C,
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<4|handout:0>]{~2~}{~end~}},
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<2-3|handout:0>]{~3~}{~end~}},
    moredelim={**[is][\btHL<6-|handout:0>]{~6~}{~end~}},
} -->
 

::: {.r-stack}
![](/overflow-heap/texfig/heap-pointer-subter.figure-1.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=1}

![](/overflow-heap/texfig/heap-pointer-subter.figure-2.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=2}

![](/overflow-heap/texfig/heap-pointer-subter.figure-3.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=3}

![](/overflow-heap/texfig/heap-pointer-subter.figure-4.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=4}

![](/overflow-heap/texfig/heap-pointer-subter.figure-5.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=5}

![](/overflow-heap/texfig/heap-pointer-subter.figure-6.svg){.fragment .fade-in-then-out fragment-index=6}


:::
